{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603241215021CFD28BE82AC3638D115\"}"},"total":14},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7301864821560918825","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书精辟地披露了社会职场的险恶，真实展现了金钱压倒一切的人际关系。故事情节生动曲折，阅读时容易引发读者对现实生活的共鸣"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700100179,"group_id":"7122398355681971214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N942duipleFQ+PSdSROSCbNpoUmDKkrxA0r4Rf3WYATH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3716767093885000","user_name":"登封的祈愿蛇仙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3716767093885000","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7122398355681971214","book_info":{"abstract":"一个原本衣食无忧的大学生，因为家中变故，不得不放弃学业，进入职场。而职场却远没有他想象的那么简单和温情。面对一次次的利益算计，职位的竞争，拉拢与排挤，最终得到的自己的地位和资源，也对职场有了自己的认识。友谊，同事，领导在一次次晋升和机会面前，不同的人会有不同的选择，而每种选择也许都没有绝对的对与错！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a0ab71ce75e43e7fe9022e4918685806~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"文刚","author_id":"","book_id":"7122398355681971214","book_name":"职场潜规则","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\
